hypothesis: Replacing absolute Fighter1/Fighter2 features with differential (Fighter1 - Fighter2) features plus derived stats (WinRate, TakedownAccuracy, TotalFights) should improve model accuracy by providing the comparison signal directly and reducing feature dimensionality

data_changes.feature_transformation: Absolute Fighter1/Fighter2 numerical features replaced with differential (F1 - F2) features
data_changes.removed_features: All 36 absolute Fighter1_*/Fighter2_* numerical columns replaced by 18 differential + 5 new derived differential columns
